perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a black cap, glasses, and a black t-shirt sits in front of a blurry living room background. He gestures with his hands while speaking directly to the camera. (2) A large green Uber Eats logo and then a Costco logo with a Membership card graphic appear on screen. (3) A screen recording of a mobile app showing the 'Uber Delivery' interface is displayed. (4) Various cartoon-style icons representing toiletries, snacks, and seafood appear around the man as he continues to speak. (5) He points to the camera in a closing gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately along with a male voice speaking in a friendly, energetic tone. (2) Each time a graphic or text overlay appears on screen, a subtle 'whoosh' or 'pop' sound effect (SFX) is heard. (3) The vocal is consistent in volume and clarity throughout the entire duration, with the music maintaining a steady level underneath.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen translating the spoken content. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '3c有意思Tim哥' and '@3ctim' social media handles in the top left. (3) Hook Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 也可以買到 Costco 產品!?' with an excited tone. (4) Decorative Text: 'Uber Eats', '2025下半年', '會員 非會員' appear to emphasize key points.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a consistent talking-head format with heavy use of graphic overlays and B-roll screen recordings to illustrate the news being shared.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male, short hair, wearing a black newsboy cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a black Apple-branded t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurred indoor setting that appears to be a living room or a dedicated studio space with a couch visible in the bokeh.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Soft studio lighting, well-lit subject with balanced shadows.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a news update regarding the future collaboration between Costco and Uber Eats in Taiwan, specifically highlighting that non-members will be able to order Costco products via the delivery app starting in late 2025, though pricing structures may differ between members and non-members.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is a news/tech commentary piece reporting on public corporate announcements rather than a sponsored promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator (3c Tim) uses a specific visual style characterized by rapid-fire graphic overlays and his signature newsboy cap and glasses look.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses mobile UI screen recordings to provide concrete evidence for the commentary being delivered.
